description_long: This is a detailed figurine of a person dressed in traditional Andean attire, featuring a vibrant, multicolored poncho with vertical and horizontal stripes in red, green, yellow, and pink hues. The doll wears a black, wide-brimmed hat with white stitching and a red band, and its face is painted with a lifelike expression. The figure holds a wooden staff or flute in its right hand, and its lower half is dressed in black knee-length pants with white trim and brown sandals. The poncho is adorned with fringed edges, and the doll stands on a white, irregularly shaped base. The craftsmanship highlights intricate textile patterns and cultural details, making it a striking representation of Andean heritage.
description: A colorful Andean doll wearing a striped poncho, black hat, and sandals, holding a staff and standing on a white base. The figure features detailed traditional clothing and lifelike facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, striped poncho, staff, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the staff, and the layered poncho.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hat, the full pattern of the poncho, and the sandals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, the staff, and the poncho's drape.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional Andean clothing with a multicolored striped poncho, black knee-length pants with white trim, brown sandals, and a black wide-brimmed hat with white stitching and a red band. The poncho features intricate woven patterns and fringed edges.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with the head facing forward, right arm bent holding a staff, left arm relaxed at the side, legs straight and close together, and torso erect.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a slight closed-mouth smile, eyes open and looking forward, eyebrows relaxed.
attribute_hair_style: Short brown hair, partially visible under the hat, straight and close to the head.
